findings.title: Synthetic command_evidence_ref points at a different pack
findings.detail: The synthetic request carries docs/closeout-packs/cp00-016/command-evidence.json inside a CP00-018 fixture. The normalizer treats this as deterministic synthetic example data and not a correctness or security issue.

findings.title: Minor uncovered branches: null matter_id and namespace-prefix / acceptance-gate drift
findings.detail: Tests exercise representative shared validation paths; RP validator and shared array equality loops cover the invariant indirectly.

findings.title: README prose omits explicit synthetic-only-policy and fixture-integrity dependency mention
findings.detail: The structural contract and validators carry synthetic_only_policy_ref RP00.P00.M06.S01 and fixture integrity requirements; this is documentation-completeness guidance only.

security_notes: normalizeControlPlaneSyntheticFixtureSetRequest is pure, side-effect-free metadata construction with no file/network/DB/storage I/O.
Any truthy forbidden input claim or unknown claim fails closed.
All canonical array fields are pinned by ordered equality; output hardcodes no-real-data, no-write, and no runtime/fixture generation flags.
test_notes: Five dedicated tests cover policy, frozen happy-path metadata, fail-closed cases, module shape, and fixture mirror.
RP00 validator failure before evidence creation was only missing CP00-018 evidence files.
raw_review.summary: CP00-018 correctly binds RP00.P02.M06.S02 after S01. The normalizer produces only deterministic frozen metadata with no fixture generation/persistence, service execution, runtime route creation, database/storage/product-state writes, or real data use. Upstream dependencies on S01, S20, P00 synthetic-only policy, and fixture integrity are carried consistently. No P0/P1/P2 findings; three non-blocking P3 quality notes.

raw_review_text: Review complete. PASS_WITH_FINDINGS. No blockers: 0 P0/P1/P2, 3 P3 notes. CP00-018 / RP00.P02.M06.S02 is internally consistent across contract, policy/module, fixture, test, README, and RP validator; the only outstanding validator item is expected evidence assembly.
adjudication_notes: Claude returned PASS_WITH_FINDINGS with no P0, P1, or P2 findings. Three P3 findings are deferred in adjudication.md.
